name: Foundation Stack
description: Combined foundation template providing networking (VPC, subnets, security groups) and observability (Langfuse, OpenTelemetry). Deploy once per account/region, consumed by all use case templates.

deployment_patterns.name: Langfuse on ECS
deployment_patterns.description: ECS Fargate with managed Aurora PostgreSQL, ElastiCache Redis, and ClickHouse

deployment_patterns.name: Langfuse on EKS (coming soon)
deployment_patterns.description: EKS with managed Aurora PostgreSQL, ElastiCache Redis, and ClickHouse via Helm

deployment_patterns.name: Langfuse on EKS — all pods (coming soon)
deployment_patterns.description: EKS with all backing services as in-cluster pods (PostgreSQL, Redis, ClickHouse, MinIO)

parameters.name: existing_vpc_id
parameters.description: Existing VPC ID to reuse (leave empty to create new)

outputs.langfuse_secret_name: Secrets Manager secret name containing Langfuse API keys

example_use_cases: Shared VPC for all agent deployments
author: FSI Agent Kit Team
